title: elaeocarpus brachystachyus
intro: Elaeocarpus brachystachyus, also known as the Blue Marble Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the Elaeocarpaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus brachystachyus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
